title: Tapers
description: Seal joints between plasterboard or other wallboard to prepare wall surface for painting or papering.

tasks.text: Spread sealing compound between boards or panels or over cracks, holes, nail heads, or screw heads, using trowels, broadknives, or spatulas.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Press paper tape over joints to embed tape into sealing compound and to seal joints.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Apply additional coats to fill in holes and make surfaces smooth.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Seal joints between plasterboard or other wallboard to prepare wall surfaces for painting or papering.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Spread and smooth cementing material over tape, using trowels or floating machines to blend joints with wall surfaces.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Sand or patch nicks or cracks in plasterboard or wallboard.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Mix sealing compounds by hand or with portable electric mixers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Work on high ceilings, using scaffolding or other tools, such as stilts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Select the correct sealing compound or tape.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Countersink nails or screws below surfaces of walls before applying sealing compounds, using hammers or screwdrivers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove extra compound after surfaces have been covered sufficiently.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Install metal molding at wall corners to secure wallboard.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Apply texturizing compounds or primers to walls or ceilings before final finishing, using trowels, brushes, rollers, or spray guns.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Check adhesives to ensure that they will work and will remain durable.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Sand rough spots of dried cement between applications of compounds.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Use mechanical applicators that spread compounds and embed tape in one operation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
